message:
test(search-core): add 106 tests for lexical_parser, hybrid_candidates, and canonical

Expand lexical_parser.rs from 43 to 98 tests covering:
- levenshtein_distance: identical, both empty, one empty, substitution,
  insertion, deletion, completely different, symmetric
- suggest_hint_field: one typo, two typos, too far, tiebreak
- split_query_tokens: simple, quoted preserved, empty, unclosed quote,
  multiple quoted
- normalize_hint_value: plain, strips quotes, trims whitespace,
  quoted whitespace only, single quote
- normalize_hint_field: all 6 canonical fields, all 10 aliases,
  case insensitive, unknown
- SanitizedQuery: Debug, Clone, Eq
- AppliedFilterHint/DidYouMeanHint: serde roundtrip, Debug, Clone
- QueryAssistance: Default, serde roundtrip, serde skips empty vecs
- parse_query_assistance: empty input, field empty value, only hints,
  colon in value
- quote_hyphenated_tokens: no hyphens, already quoted, multiple tokens
- sanitize_query: backslash, tilde, curly braces, only special chars,
  mixed content
- Tantivy: ParseOutcome Debug, regex_escape_prefix, custom boosts,
  unity boost no wrapper, config Debug/Clone, prefix with special chars,
  fallback all terms fail, new constructor

Expand hybrid_candidates.rs from 39 to 64 tests covering:
- CandidateMode/QueryClass/CandidateSource: Debug, Clone, Copy traits
- CandidateBudgetConfig: serde roundtrip, Debug, Clone
- CandidateHit/PreparedCandidate/CandidateStageCounts/CandidatePreparation:
  serde roundtrip
- QueryClass::classify: hyphenated-only, thread prefix, three short words,
  long single word
- CandidateMode/QueryClass: serde snake_case verification
- best_rank: picks minimum, only lexical, no ranks
- rank_or_max/score_cmp_desc: all edge cases
- prepare_candidates: negative scores, single hit each

Expand canonical.rs from 43 to 69 tests covering:
- CanonPolicy: Default, Debug, Clone/Copy/Eq
- strip_markdown: indented lists, code fence with language, multiple fences,
  plus markers, empty input
- redact_secrets: gitlab, slack, github_pat, jwt tokens
- normalize_text: unicode whitespace, mixed whitespace
- extract_text: thread same as message, both empty
- canonicalize: RedactSecrets policy, whitespace only
- content_hash: empty string known value, unicode
- canonicalize_and_hash: empty, title only ignores body

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
